option_line: bffi_oakRespBornDeadB:"Novice Bornanew is dead. I have his body. And his murderer."
original: Novice Bornanew is dead. I have his body. And his murderer.

option_line: bffi_oakRespBornDead:"Novice Bornanew is dead. I have returned with his body."
original: Novice Bornanew is dead. I have returned with his body.

option_line: bffi_oakRespBornDead:"Novice Bornanew is dead. I have returned with his body."
original: Novice Bornanew is dead. I have returned with his body.

The expression of the Excubitor Orbis does not change. Nonetheless, a coldness seems to have come over him, as if transformed into a statue.

The moment draws out and you think he might not respond, then he speaks. "She is expected."

He remains stone-faced.

option_line: bffi_deliverKeepfaithOak:Deliver Cedra Keepfaith into custody of the Knights of Ludd.
original: Deliver Cedra Keepfaith into custody of the Knights of Ludd.

The expression of the Excubitor Orbis does not change. Nonetheless, a coldness seems to have come over him, as if transformed into a statue.

The moment draws out and you think he might not respond, then he speaks. "He is expected."

He remains stone-faced.

option_line: bffi_deliverKeepfaithOak:Take Bornanew down to the Knights of Ludd.
original: Take Bornanew down to the Knights of Ludd.

The expression of the Excubitor Orbis does not change. Nonetheless, a coldness seems to have come over him, as if transformed into a statue.

The moment draws out and you think he might not respond, then he speaks. "He is expected."

He remains stone-faced.

option_line: bffi_deliverKeepfaithOak:Take Bornanew down to the Knights of Ludd.
original: Take Bornanew down to the Knights of Ludd.

The expression of the Excubitor Orbis does not change. Nonetheless, a coldness seems to have come over him, as if transformed into a statue.

The moment draws out and you think he might not respond, then he speaks. "Bring him."

He remains stone-faced.
